generation.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: central tile-kind glyph for a premium portrait mobile board game
Primary request: one unmistakable walking-footprints symbol for a NORMAL route tile, showing exactly two alternating boot-print silhouettes angled gently upward, immediately readable as ordinary movement or a safe path.
Scene/backdrop: one perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for local alpha removal.
Subject: two compact explorer boot prints with simple heel-and-sole shapes, bold clean silhouette, no tread detail smaller than a phone pixel.
Style/medium: monochrome Kenney-like board-game icon, flat near-black warm ink, even visual weight matching bold coin, campfire, skull, pouch, open-book and swirl glyphs.
Composition/framing: one centered glyph in a square canvas with generous padding; balanced optical mass; no border, plate or tile frame.
Lighting/mood: flat graphic, no shadows, no gradients.
Color palette: near-black warm ink subject only on uniform green key background.
Constraints: exactly two footprints; no text, numbers, logo or watermark; no arrows; no stones; no stacked discs; no coins; no skull; no triangle; no bag; no book; no swirl; no house.
Avoid: texture, perspective, 3D rendering, tiny tread details, multiple variants, extra objects, background variation.

license.kenney_reference: style reference only; not claimed as Kenney source
